requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Supply and China GB/T 18487 Evidence

summary.en: Kazakhstan uses 50 Hz power systems, so Chinese EV chargers designed for China are usually frequency-compatible at a basic rating level. The remaining issue is not frequency alone but site voltage, phase configuration, earthing system, power quality, thermal derating, cold-weather operation, surge environment, and local protection coordination.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦使用50Hz电力系统，因此面向中国设计的电动汽车充电设备通常在基础频率额定值上兼容。剩余问题不仅是频率，还包括站点电压、相数配置、接地系统、电能质量、热降额、寒冷环境运行、浪涌环境和本地保护配合。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦使用50Hz電力系統，因此面向中國設計的電動汽車充電設備通常在基礎頻率額定值上相容。剩餘問題不僅是頻率，還包括站點電壓、相數配置、接地系統、電能品質、熱降額、寒冷環境運行、浪湧環境和本地保護配合。

standards_or_laws: Kazakhstan electricity supply and grid connection technical conditions
Applicable GOST / ST RK electrical installation and power-quality requirements
Project-specific cold-climate, enclosure, and environmental specifications

summary.en: China GB/T 18487 evidence typically supports 50 Hz operation and charger control behavior. GB/T 20234 connector evidence and GB/T 27930 DC communication evidence may also be included, but they must be mapped to Kazakhstan site conditions and any IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 requirements.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 18487证据通常支持50Hz运行和充电控制行为。也可能包括GB/T 20234连接器证据和GB/T 27930直流通信证据，但必须映射到哈萨克斯坦站点条件以及任何IEC 61851/IEC 62196要求。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 18487證據通常支持50Hz運行和充電控制行為。也可能包括GB/T 20234連接器證據和GB/T 27930直流通訊證據，但必須映射到哈薩克斯坦站點條件以及任何IEC 61851/IEC 62196要求。

standards_or_laws: China charger environmental and power-quality test reports

gap.en: Document 50 Hz nameplate suitability, accepted input-voltage range, three-phase and single-phase variants, neutral and earthing assumptions, derating curves, heater or cooling behavior, IP / IK ratings, surge protection, residual-current protection, and low-temperature startup behavior.
gap.zh: 应记录50Hz铭牌适用性、允许输入电压范围、三相和单相变体、中性线和接地假设、降额曲线、加热或冷却行为、IP/IK等级、浪涌保护、剩余电流保护和低温启动行为。
gap.zht: 應記錄50Hz銘牌適用性、允許輸入電壓範圍、三相和單相變體、中性線和接地假設、降額曲線、加熱或冷卻行為、IP/IK等級、浪湧保護、剩餘電流保護和低溫啟動行為。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by site technical conditions, utility approval, electrical installation rules, tender, or project specification; otherwise a core technical acceptance check
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese product safety, GB/T charger scope, and customer requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Shared 50 Hz frequency reduces one compatibility risk, but it does not close Kazakhstan voltage, earthing, power-quality, environmental, connector, or grid-approval gaps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 同为50Hz可降低一个兼容性风险，但不能覆盖哈萨克斯坦电压、接地、电能质量、环境、连接器或电网批准差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 同為50Hz可降低一個相容性風險，但不能覆蓋哈薩克斯坦電壓、接地、電能品質、環境、連接器或電網批准差距。
